event: The Hunchback of Notre-Dame among the gargoyles
description: A hunched figure clings to the Gothic stonework of Notre-Dame cathedral high above Paris. Around him, stone gargoyles and chimera in the shapes of horned beasts perch on ornate carved balustrades. Large dark birds circle in the air. Far below, the rooftops of Paris stretch to the horizon in a gray atmospheric haze. The perspective is vertiginous, looking down from the cathedral's heights. The palette is muted grays and browns with the warm stone of the carved Gothic elements.
